picks.title: 46th Annual Eggstravaganza Easter Egg Hunt
picks.why: Annual Easter egg hunt tradition—families hunt for eggs throughout Downtown Campbell on Saturday morning.

picks.title: Bunnies & Bonnets Easter Parade
picks.why: Rare annual parade with marching bands, dancers, and animals celebrating Easter in Downtown Campbell Saturday.

picks.title: San Jose Earthquakes vs. San Diego FC
picks.why: San Jose Earthquakes home opener Saturday night at PayPal Park—first regular season game of the year.
